title: lithocarpus rassa var. suffruticosus
intro: Lithocarpus rassa var. suffruticosus, a lesser-known variety of the Lithocarpus rassa species, is a type of evergreen tree native to the tropical forests of Southeast Asia. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities. The health benefits of Lithocarpus rassa var. suffruticosus include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and support immune function. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, although its applications and usage may vary depending on the region and cultural practices.
